name: GPT-5.6
archDisplay: Undisclosed architecture (presumed dense transformer); three durable capability tiers Sol/Terra/Luna (this entry reflects flagship Sol)
note: Sol tier billed as OpenAI's best coding model yet (Terminal-Bench 2.1 SOTA); limited-preview June 26 under US govt review, GA July 9, 2026.

results.notes: SWE-Bench Pro, GPT-5.6 Sol; confirmed via marktechpost.com direct report of launch page
Terminal-Bench 2.1, GPT-5.6 Sol standard (91.9 with Ultra), new SOTA; confirmed
BrowseComp, GPT-5.6 Sol standard (92.2 with Ultra); confirmed
Agents' Last Exam, GPT-5.6 Sol; confirmed
FrontierMath Tier 1-3 v2, GPT-5.6 Sol; confirmed
FrontierMath Tier 4 v2, GPT-5.6 Sol; confirmed
GPQA Diamond, GPT-5.6 Sol; BenchLM published-score snapshot (verified July 11, 2026); not included in OpenAI's own launch eval tables
Humanity's Last Exam, GPT-5.6 Sol (max reasoning); Artificial Analysis independent evaluation; tool setting not stated on page

verificationNotes: Existence, July 9 2026 GA (June 26 limited govt preview), 1.05M context, and $5/$30 Sol pricing all confirmed directly via developers.openai.com/api/docs/models/gpt-5.6-sol and multiple outlets (Simon Willison, VentureBeat, MarkTechPost). All six benchmark scores independently corroborated via MarkTechPost's direct report of the OpenAI launch page.
